display.purpose: Large, theatrical headlines, hero movie names, and high-impact calls to action.

headline.purpose: Primary section titles, such as listing categories, plan grids, and trending banners.

title.purpose: Title descriptions on movie posters, metadata titles, and pricing options.

body.purpose: Movie synopsis, user reviews, policy pages, and general narrative texts.

label.purpose: Tags, category filters, movie ratings, runtimes, and small navigation links.

shadows.name: Crimson Halo
shadows.purpose: Backlit crimson aura under elevated active cards and buttons.

shadows.name: Midnight Ambient
shadows.purpose: Deep ambient background shadow to float dropdown menus and auth panels.

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Premium fluid acceleration curve for card expansion, navigation fades, and button scaling.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Premium call-to-actions, subscription actions, and emphasized buttons.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #E50914; color: #ffffff; padding: 14px 28px; font-family: Outfit, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #b80710; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Standard actions, info requests, and secondary control elements.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #1a1a1a; color: #ffffff; padding: 14px 28px; font-family: Outfit, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background-color: #222222; border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

components.name: Media Card
components.description: Poster thumbnail wrapper for movie and show lists.
components.css: .ds-card-media { background: #0b0b0b; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px; width: 220px; font-family: Outfit, sans-serif; transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), box-shadow 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); cursor: pointer; } .ds-card-poster { height: 280px; background: #1a1a1a url('https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w500/gEU2QvHOm5geW89DYrQ4ga4j5sn.jpg') center/cover no-repeat; border-radius: 4px; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-card-title { color: #ffffff; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 6px; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .ds-card-meta { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 0.8125rem; color: #94a3b8; } .ds-card-rating { color: #eaa71c; font-weight: 500; } .ds-card-media:hover { transform: translateY(-4px) scale(1.03); box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(229, 9, 20, 0.15); border-color: rgba(229, 9, 20, 0.2); }

narrative.overview: FlickHQ is designed to mimic the premium, dim-light atmosphere of a modern high-end cinema. Built strictly on dark, light-absorbing obsidian foundations and highlighted by hot, high-energy crimson spotlights, the visual experience prioritizes high-fidelity poster art and immersive media banners.
keyCharacteristics: Deep Contrast Framing: Pure obsidian black backdrops that direct all eyes to colorful movie assets.
Tactile Responsive Focus: Springs, deep scales, and elegant fades that elevate elements on mouse hover.
Absolute Dark Comfort: Deep dark tones designed to protect eyes during nighttime viewing.
Bilingual Structural Balance: Native typography sizing that functions symmetrically for English and Arabic layouts.

rules.name: The Spotlighting Rule
rules.body: The Cinematic Crimson accent must occupy less than 10% of any single viewport page. It is a dramatic spotlight; overuse dilutes its premium theatrical impact.

rules.name: The Cinematic Contrast Rule
rules.body: Headlines must always use a minimum font weight of 700 to present a bold, theatrical silhouette, whereas body paragraphs must use a light font weight of 300 to maximize readability on bright dark screens.

rules.name: The Flat-at-Rest Rule
rules.body: All cards and list items remain completely flat against their background when passive. Ambient shadows and scale expansions appear only on user focus or hover to signify clickability.

dos: Do respect the Spotlighting Rule. Ensure the primary Crimson accent remains a rare, high-value focal point.
Do cap text body widths to 75 characters to avoid tiring horizontal line-sweeps in movie descriptions.
Do use smooth custom bezier transitions (cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1)) for all image scale-ups on hover.
Do ensure high-contrast accessibility (AAA) by verifying readability of light text against obsidian dark backdrops.
donts: Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left or border-right accent lines greater than 1px) to emphasize cards or notifications.
Don't use neon gradients or multi-colored text clips that mimic low-end SaaS advertising styles.
Don't offer a stark white light-mode that ruins the eye comfort of a movie-going experience.
Don't create flat, static movie poster grids that lack hover transitions and scaling feedback.
Don't break layouts or use un-optimized font weights when switching layouts from LTR (English) to RTL (Arabic).
